title: Paper Bot Runtime Simulation
summary: Paper Trade Signal -> Paper Regime Review -> Paper Risk Gate -> Paper Decision -> Paper Trade Result -> Paper Scorecard -> Paper Runtime Review -> Next Safe Action.

steps.title: Paper Trade Signal
steps.detail: Signal source is local paper-trade sample data only.

steps.title: Paper Regime Review
steps.detail: Regime is trend_review and requires paper review.

steps.title: Paper Risk Gate
steps.detail: Confidence and sample size block the Paper Runtime.

steps.title: Paper Trade Result
steps.detail: No simulated paper fill occurs while risk is blocked.

steps.title: Paper Scorecard
steps.detail: Paper Scorecard remains neutral with blocked reason.

steps.title: Paper Runtime Review
steps.detail: Paper Review Report explains blocked runtime result.

scorecard.blocked_reason: No Paper Trade Result was allowed.

next_safe_action: Review blocked Paper Risk Gate result and rerun the DRY_RUN validator.
